Tools forged for
the wasteland

One bot. Every Rust data source wired directly into your Discord.

🎮
Twitch & Kick Drops
Active drop campaigns posted the moment they go live.
🎨
Skins & DLC
New Steam Workshop skins and DLC releases with region-aware pricing.
📰
Devblogs & News
Facepunch devblogs, community posts and general Rust news.
🛠️
Commits & Oxide
Facepunch GitHub commits and Oxide/uMod plugin updates.
🚫
Ban Logs
Latest org bans with full user profile, account age and reason.
⚙️
Player Tools
VAC checks, hours verification, raid calculator, recycler, blueprint lookup.
🔒
Content Filter
Auto-detects and removes CSAM spam links with instant ban.
🧹
Wipe Schedule
Track forced wipes, set custom countdowns, auto-notify.
🔌
Rust+ Integration
Live map, team tracker, in-game chat bridge, monument status.

Wasteland

// wipe schedule

Wipe History
& Next Dates.

Facepunch force wipes happen the first Thursday of every month.

// commands

Every command
you need.

All slash-based. No prefix, no confusion.

/rust pingLatency check — is the bot alive?
/rust helpShow all available RustWire commands
/rust dropsPost current Twitch Drop campaigns
/rust kick-dropsPost current Kick Drop campaigns
/rust skinsAll available Rust store skins (region-aware)
/rust dlcAll available Rust DLC with region-correct prices
/rust devblogsLatest Facepunch Devblogs (posts last 3 to feed channel)
/rust communityLatest Facepunch Community posts (posts last 3)
/rust generalLatest Facepunch General posts (posts last 3)
/rust commitsLatest Facepunch GitHub commits summary
/rust oxideLatest Oxide/uMod releases summary
/rust bansLatest BattleMetrics org bans (requires API key)
/rust bancheck [steamid]Check Steam VAC, Game, Community bans + BattleMetrics
/rust playtime [steamid]Rust hours, total Steam playtime, top 5 games
/rust inventory [steamid]Show Steam Rust inventory with market prices
/rust wipeNext forced wipe countdown
/rust faqShow RustWire FAQ
/rust setregion [cc]Set store region for skin/DLC prices (e.g. GB, US) — admin only
/rust filter [on/off]Enable or disable content filter — admin only
/rust setupchannelsCreate or refresh feed channels — admin only
/rust repopulateRepost latest content to all feed channels — admin only
/rust posthoursPost the Rust Hours verification card — admin only
/wire botstatsBot statistics — owner only, ephemeral
/wire language set [lang]Set server language for bot responses — admin only
/wire language currentShow currently configured language
/wire language listList all available languages
/wire setwelcome [channel]Set welcome / leave message channel — admin only
⚔️ Raid
/raid calculateCalculate raid cost for a structure
/raid compareCompare all raid methods side-by-side
/raid planCreate a raid plan with material splitting for your team
/raid materialsCalculate materials needed to craft explosives
♻️ Recycle
/recycle item [item]Show what you get from recycling an item
/recycle search [query]Search recyclable items
🔨 Craft
/craft recipe [item]Show crafting recipe and materials needed
/craft batch [item] [qty]Calculate materials for batch crafting
/craft team [item] [qty]Split crafting materials among team members
/craft search [query]Search craftable items
📋 Blueprint
/blueprint addMark a blueprint as learned
/blueprint removeRemove a blueprint from your list
/blueprint listShow all your learned blueprints
/blueprint teamShow all blueprints across your team
/blueprint who [item]Find who on the team has a specific blueprint
/blueprint search [query]Search the blueprints database
🔧 Repair & Smelt
/repair costCalculate repair cost for an item
/repair worthCompare repair cost vs crafting from scratch
/smelt calculateCalculate smelting output and fuel needed
/smelt compareCompare furnace efficiency side-by-side
🏠 Base & Upkeep
/upkeep calculateDaily TC upkeep cost + how long your resources last
/upkeep decayHow long until a structure decays without upkeep
📍 Monuments & CCTV
/puzzle guideGet full monument puzzle walkthrough
/puzzle listList all monument guides
/puzzle keycardKeycard locations and colour info
/puzzle difficultyList monuments sorted by difficulty
/cctv listList all known CCTV codes
/cctv searchSearch for a specific CCTV code
/cctv addAdd a custom CCTV code — admin only
/cctv removeRemove a custom CCTV code — admin only
/cctv customView your server's custom CCTV codes
🛒 Vending & Market
/vending alertSet a price alert for an item
/vending alertsView your active price alerts
/vending removeRemove a price alert
/vending historyView price history for an item
⏰ Wipe Schedule
/wipeschedule setupSetup wipe schedule notifications — admin only
/wipeschedule infoShow current wipe schedule config
/wipeschedule postManually post next wipe notification
/wipeschedule enableEnable wipe notifications — admin only
/wipeschedule disableDisable wipe notifications — admin only
🏆 Leveling & Wipe Stats
/leveling leaderboardTop 10 XP leaderboard for this server
/leveling toggleEnable or disable the leveling system — admin only
/leveling settingsConfigure XP rates and level-up messages — admin only
/leveling managexpAdd/remove/set XP for a user — admin only
/leveling resetxpReset XP for a user or the whole server — admin only
/wipestats currentShow stats for the current wipe
/wipestats setchannelSet channel for automatic wipe summary — admin only
👥 LFG
/lfg postCreate a Looking For Group post
/lfg searchSearch for teammates
/lfg mypostView or delete your LFG post
/lfg rateRate a teammate after playing together
/lfg profileView a user's LFG profile and ratings
/lfg postCreate a Looking For Group post to find teammates
/lfg searchSearch for teammates by role, hours, playstyle, region
/lfg mypostView or delete your current LFG post
/lfg rate [user]Rate a teammate (1–5 stars + review)
/lfg profile [user]View a user's LFG profile and ratings
/leveling rankView your XP rank on this server
/leveling leaderboardTop 10 XP leaderboard for this server
/leveling toggle [on/off]Enable or disable the leveling system — admin only
/leveling settingsConfigure XP rates, level-up messages — admin only
/leaderboard register [steamid]Link your SteamID to join the Rust stats leaderboard
/leaderboard showShow server Rust stats leaderboard (kills, K/D, hours)
/leaderboard profile [user]View your or another user's leaderboard profile
/faqShow RustWire FAQ
/helpShow all available commands
/pingCheck bot latency
⚙️ Setup
/rustplus helpShow all Rust+ commands
/rustplus setupConnect your Rust+ server to Discord — admin only
/rustplus configConfigure auto-update channel and interval — admin only
/rustplus disconnectDisconnect from Rust+ — admin only
/rustplus reconnectReconnect to Rust+ — admin only
🗺️ Server Info
/rustplus mapShow live map of your connected Rust server
/rustplus infoServer info: population, map size, queue
/rustplus timeCurrent in-game time
/rustplus monumentsList active monuments and their status
/rustplus shopsList all vending machine shops on the map
/rustplus peaktimeShow peak player activity hours chart for this server
👥 Team
/rustplus teamShow team members and their online status
/rustplus switch [entity_id]Control a smart switch remotely
/rustplus trackerTrack online/offline status of specific players
/rustplus marker addAdd a custom map marker (base, loot, etc.)
/rustplus marker listList your saved map markers
/rustplus marker removeRemove a custom map marker
// setup

Up and running
in 60 seconds.

No coding. No config files. Three clicks and your server is wired.

01
➕
Add the bot
Click "Add Bot" and authorize RustWire to your Discord server. Takes 10 seconds.
──────
02
⚙️
Use commands or set up channels
Ask for info anytime with slash commands — or optionally run /wire setupchannels to get automatic feed channels for drops, skins, and more.
──────
03
📡
You're live
RustWire starts posting automatically. No manual updates, no missed drops.

// legal

Privacy Policy

// Data We CollectRustWire collects Discord user IDs, guild IDs, and Steam IDs submitted via verification commands. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties.
// Message ContentRustWire reads message content only for content filter purposes. Messages are not stored, logged, or used for any other purpose.
// Data RetentionGuild configuration data is stored for bot operation. Users can request deletion via Discord.
// ContactFor privacy concerns, contact us via our Discord server.
Last updated: June 2026 · Not affiliated with Facepunch Studios or Discord Inc.

// legal

Privacy Policy.

Last updated: June 2026

1. Who we are

RustWire (rustwire.co.uk) is a Discord bot and web portal for the Rust gaming community, registered in the United Kingdom.

2. What data we collect

When you log in with Discord we receive and store your Discord user ID, username, avatar, and a list of shared servers. When you use the community chat we store your message content, username, avatar URL, and timestamp. We also use Vercel Analytics and Microsoft Clarity to collect anonymous usage data.

3. How we use your data

To authenticate you, power the community chat, and improve the website. We do not sell your data or use it for advertising.

4. Data storage

Chat messages and user data are stored in Supabase (EU region). Your Discord token is stored only in your browser's localStorage and is never sent to our servers.

5. Cookies & local storage

  • rustwire_user — Discord login session
  • rw_lang — language preference
  • rw_cl_seen — changelog visit tracker
  • Vercel Analytics and Microsoft Clarity may set analytics cookies

6. Your rights (UK GDPR)

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To request deletion contact us via our Discord server.

7. Third-party services

  • Discord Privacy Policy
  • Supabase Privacy Policy
  • Vercel Privacy Policy
  • Microsoft Clarity Privacy

8. Contact

For privacy questions, join our Discord server and contact an admin.

RUSTWIRE
// The all-in-one Discord bot for Rust.

// legal

Terms of Service.

Last updated: July 2026

1. Acceptance of these Terms

By accessing or using RustWire (rustwire.co.uk), our Discord bot, or any related service (collectively, the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the Service.

2. Description of the Service

RustWire provides a Discord bot and companion web portal for the Rust gaming community, including but not limited to server statistics, command references, changelog updates, a community showcase, live community chat, and a user dashboard. Features may be added, changed, or removed at any time without prior notice.

3. Eligibility & Your Account

You must have a valid Discord account and comply with Discord's Terms of Service to use features that require login. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your Discord account and for all activity that occurs through it while connected to our Service.

4. Community Chat & Acceptable Use

When using our community chat or any interactive feature, you agree not to:

  • Post unlawful, defamatory, hateful, abusive, or sexually explicit content
  • Harass, threaten, or impersonate other users or staff
  • Spam, flood, or attempt to disrupt the Service
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, its bot, or other users' accounts
  • Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of Discord's Community Guidelines

We reserve the right to remove content and suspend or terminate access for any user who violates these rules, at our sole discretion and without prior notice.

5. Intellectual Property

The RustWire name, logo, website design, and original content are the property of RustWire and may not be copied, reproduced, or redistributed without prior written permission. Rust and Facepunch Studios trademarks belong to their respective owners; RustWire is an independent, fan-made project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Facepunch Studios.

6. Third-Party Services

The Service integrates with third-party platforms including Discord, Supabase, Vercel, and Ko-fi. Your use of those platforms is governed by their own terms and privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their availability, content, or practices.

  • Discord Terms of Service
  • Supabase Terms of Service
  • Vercel Terms of Service
  • Ko-fi Terms of Use

7. Donations

Donations made through our Ko-fi page are voluntary contributions to support development and hosting costs. Donations are non-refundable and do not entitle the donor to any guaranteed feature, priority support, or ownership stake in the Service, unless explicitly stated at the time of donation.

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure, including in-game statistics or command data sourced from third-party APIs.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, RustWire and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the Service, including any loss of data, in-game progress, or Discord server activity.

10. Termination

We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause or notice, including for violation of these Terms. You may stop using the Service at any time by disconnecting your Discord account and clearing local site data.

11. Changes to these Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Kingdom, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

13. Contact

If you have questions about these Terms, join our Discord server and contact an admin.
